# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cicd security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - staging
  - production

variables:
  DEPLOY_USER: "deployer"
  ARTIFACT_DIR: "build_output"

default:
  before_script:
    - echo "Pipeline ID ${CI_PIPELINE_ID} | Job ${CI_JOB_NAME}"

build:
  stage: build
  image: golang:1.21-alpine
  script:
    - mkdir -p ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/bin ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/configs
    - echo "Building application binaries..."
    - CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/bin/app ./cmd/app
    - cp -r configs/* ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/configs/
    - echo "${CI_COMMIT_SHA}" > ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/BUILD_INFO
    - echo "${CI_PIPELINE_ID}" >> ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/BUILD_INFO
    - sha256sum ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/bin/app > ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/checksums.sha256
    - sha256sum ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/configs/* >> ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/checksums.sha256
  artifacts:
    name: "build-${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}-${CI_PIPELINE_ID}"
    paths:
      - ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/bin/
      - ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/configs/
      - ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/BUILD_INFO
      - ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/checksums.sha256
    expire_in: 30 days
    when: on_success
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_TAG'

unit_test:
  stage: test
  image: golang:1.21-alpine
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  script:
    - echo "Verifying build artifact integrity..."
    - sha256sum -c ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/checksums.sha256
    - echo "Running unit tests..."
    - go test -race -coverprofile=coverage.out ./...
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - coverage.out
    expire_in: 30 days
    when: on_success
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_TAG'

integration_test:
  stage: test
  image: golang:1.21-alpine
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  services:
    - name: postgres:15-alpine
      alias: test-db
  variables:
    POSTGRES_DB: "testdb"
    POSTGRES_USER: "testuser"
    POSTGRES_PASSWORD: "${TEST_DB_PASSWORD}"
    POSTGRES_HOST_AUTH_METHOD: "scram-sha-256"
    POSTGRES_INITDB_ARGS: "--auth-host=scram-sha-256"
  script:
    - sha256sum -c ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/checksums.sha256
    - echo "Running integration tests..."
    - go test -tags=integration -race ./...
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_TAG'

security_scan:
  stage: test
  image: golang:1.21-alpine
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  script:
    - sha256sum -c ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/checksums.sha256
    - echo "Running security scan on artifacts..."
    - go install golang.org/x/vuln/cmd/govulncheck@latest
    - govulncheck ./...
  allow_failure: false
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_TAG'

deploy_staging:
  stage: staging
  image: alpine:3.18
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
    - job: unit_test
      artifacts: false
    - job: integration_test
      artifacts: false
    - job: security_scan
      artifacts: false
  variables:
    DEPLOY_TARGET: "staging"
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache openssh-client coreutils
    - echo "Verifying artifact integrity before staging deployment..."
    - sha256sum -c ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/checksums.sha256
    - |
      if [ -z "${STAGING_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY}" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: STAGING_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY is not set"
        exit 1
      fi
    - mkdir -p ~/.ssh
    - chmod 700 ~/.ssh
    - printf '%s\n' "${STAGING_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY}" > ~/.ssh/deploy_key
    - chmod 600 ~/.ssh/deploy_key
    - printf '%s\n' "${STAGING_SSH_KNOWN_HOSTS}" > ~/.ssh/known_hosts
    - chmod 644 ~/.ssh/known_hosts
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to staging environment..."
    - |
      STAGING_HOST="${STAGING_DEPLOY_HOST}"
      if [ -z "${STAGING_HOST}" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: STAGING_DEPLOY_HOST is not set"
        exit 1
      fi
    - >
      scp -i ~/.ssh/deploy_key -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes
      ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/bin/app
      ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/checksums.sha256
      ${DEPLOY_USER}@${STAGING_HOST}:/opt/app/staging/
    - >
      scp -i ~/.ssh/deploy_key -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes
      -r ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/configs/
      ${DEPLOY_USER}@${STAGING_HOST}:/opt/app/staging/configs/
    - >
      ssh -i ~/.ssh/deploy_key -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes
      ${DEPLOY_USER}@${STAGING_HOST}
      "cd /opt/app/staging &&
       sha256sum -c checksums.sha256 &&
       chmod 500 app &&
       sudo systemctl restart app-staging"
  after_script:
    - rm -f ~/.ssh/deploy_key
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
    on_stop: stop_staging
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_TAG'

stop_staging:
  stage: staging
  image: alpine:3.18
  variables:
    GIT_STRATEGY: none
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache openssh-client
    - mkdir -p ~/.ssh
    - chmod 700 ~/.ssh
    - printf '%s\n' "${STAGING_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY}" > ~/.ssh/deploy_key
    - chmod 600 ~/.ssh/deploy_key
    - printf '%s\n' "${STAGING_SSH_KNOWN_HOSTS}" > ~/.ssh/known_hosts
    - chmod 644 ~/.ssh/known_hosts
  script:
    - >
      ssh -i ~/.ssh/deploy_key -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes
      ${DEPLOY_USER}@${STAGING_DEPLOY_HOST}
      "sudo systemctl stop app-staging"
  after_script:
    - rm -f ~/.ssh/deploy_key
  environment:
    name: staging
    action: stop
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
      when: manual
      allow_failure: true

smoke_test_staging:
  stage: staging
  image: curlimages/curl:latest
  needs:
    - job: deploy_staging
      artifacts: false
  script:
    - echo "Running smoke tests against staging..."
    - |
      HTTP_STATUS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" --max-time 30 https://staging.example.com/health)
      if [ "${HTTP_STATUS}" != "200" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: Health check failed with status ${HTTP_STATUS}"
        exit 1
      fi
    - echo "Smoke tests passed"
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_TAG'

deploy_production:
  stage: production
  image: alpine:3.18
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
    - job: smoke_test_staging
      artifacts: false
  variables:
    DEPLOY_TARGET: "production"
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache openssh-client coreutils
    - echo "Verifying artifact integrity before production deployment..."
    - sha256sum -c ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/checksums.sha256
    - |
      if [ -z "${PRODUCTION_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY}" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: PRODUCTION_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY is not set"
        exit 1
      fi
    - mkdir -p ~/.ssh
    - chmod 700 ~/.ssh
    - printf '%s\n' "${PRODUCTION_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY}" > ~/.ssh/deploy_key
    - chmod 600 ~/.ssh/deploy_key
    - printf '%s\n' "${PRODUCTION_SSH_KNOWN_HOSTS}" > ~/.ssh/known_hosts
    - chmod 644 ~/.ssh/known_hosts
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to production environment..."
    - |
      PRODUCTION_HOST="${PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_HOST}"
      if [ -z "${PRODUCTION_HOST}" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_HOST is not set"
        exit 1
      fi
    - >
      scp -i ~/.ssh/deploy_key -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes
      ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/bin/app
      ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/checksums.sha256
      ${DEPLOY_USER}@${PRODUCTION_HOST}:/opt/app/production/
    - >
      scp -i ~/.ssh/deploy_key -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes
      -r ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/configs/
      ${DEPLOY_USER}@${PRODUCTION_HOST}:/opt/app/production/configs/
    - >
      ssh -i ~/.ssh/deploy_key -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes
      ${DEPLOY_USER}@${PRODUCTION_HOST}
      "cd /opt/app/production &&
       sha256sum -c checksums.sha256 &&
       chmod 500 app &&
       sudo systemctl restart app-production"
    - echo "Production deployment completed for commit ${CI_COMMIT_SHA}"
  after_script:
    - rm -f ~/.ssh/deploy_key
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://www.example.com
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_TAG =~ /^v\d+\.\d+\.\d+$/'
      when: manual
      allow_failure: false
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
      when: manual
      allow_failure: false

verify_production:
  stage: production
  image: curlimages/curl:latest
  needs:
    - job: deploy_production
      artifacts: false
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  script:
    - echo "Verifying production deployment..."
    - |
      EXPECTED_SHA=$(head -1 ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/BUILD_INFO)
      echo "Expected commit SHA: ${EXPECTED_SHA}"
    - |
      for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do
        HTTP_STATUS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" --max-time 30 https://www.example.com/health)
        if [ "${HTTP_STATUS}" = "200" ]; then
          echo "Production health check passed on attempt ${i}"
          exit 0
        fi
        echo "Attempt ${i}: Health check returned ${HTTP_STATUS}, retrying in 10s..."
        sleep 10
      done
      echo "ERROR: Production health check failed after 5 attempts"
      exit 1
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_TAG =~ /^v\d+\.\d+\.\d+$/'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
